2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch extracts a helper function called mm_prepare_for_swap_entries() from the try_to_unmap_one() and copy_nonpresent_pte() functions in the Linux kernel's memory management code. The helper function ensures that a given mm_struct is added to the init_mm.mmlist so that swapoff can find and unuse its swap entries. This double-checked locking pattern was previously open-coded, but is now encapsulated in a reusable function to simplify maintenance and facilitate future modifications. The patch also updates two callers of this new helper function and includes review comments from other kernel developers.
